title: Elatinoides elatine

It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and various gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Elatinoides elatine include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Elatinoides elatine is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in the form of tinctures and extracts to treat various health conditions.
